description.value: Price 1,600 gp; Weight 1/2 lb.; Slot none; CL 8th; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION Anyone who swallows this finger-sized stony mass is subject to neutralize poison and gains a +4 bonus on savings throws against addiction for 24 hours. Once swallowed, the bezoar dissolves and its power is spent. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 800 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells neutralize poison Get this book AND Support this site!
